mapper.select: SELECT f.id, m.id AS member_id, m.nickname, m.profile_image, m.creator_verified, CASE WHEN cf.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS is_following, f.created_datetime FROM tbl_follow f JOIN tbl_member m ON f.follower_id = m.id LEFT JOIN tbl_follow cf ON cf.follower_id = #{currentMemberId} AND cf.following_id = m.id WHERE f.following_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY f.created_datetime DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT f.id, m.id AS member_id, m.nickname, m.profile_image, m.creator_verified, CASE WHEN cf.id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS is_following, f.created_datetime FROM tbl_follow f JOIN tbl_member m ON f.following_id = m.id LEFT JOIN tbl_follow cf ON cf.follower_id = #{currentMemberId} AND cf.following_id = m.id WHERE f.follower_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY f.created_datetime DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
